task_completion.description: Verify the taxpayer profile is set up correctly for Marcus Tai-Ming Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Personal Information or Wizard screen in StudioTax 2024 showing the First Name 'Marcus Tai-Ming', Last Name 'Chen', Province of Residence 'Manitoba', and Marital Status 'Single'.

task_completion.description: Verify the T4, T4E, and T4A income slips are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T4 slip entry showing 'Burgess Electric Ltd' with Box 14 as 56200, Box 44 as 1680, and Box 56 as 2840. Also look for a T4E slip showing Box 14/15 as 4320, and a T4A slip showing Box 028 as 3000.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tradesperson's tools deduction is claimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Form T777 (Employment Expenses) or the T4 slip employment expenses section showing an entry for Tradesperson's tools deduction, or Line 22900 on the T1 General showing the calculated deduction amount.

task_completion.description: Verify the RRSP contribution and First-Time Home Buyer's Tax Credit are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the RRSP entry screen showing a contribution of 3500. Additionally, look for Schedule 15 or Line 31270 (Home buyers' amount) showing the First-Time Home Buyer's Tax Credit claimed.

task_completion.description: Verify the Manitoba Education Property Tax Credit is claimed for rent paid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Form MB479 (Manitoba Credits) showing an entry of 10800 in the 'Rent paid' field for the principal residence.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed tax return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the file being saved as 'marcus_chen.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax main window title bar displaying 'marcus_chen.24t'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with StudioTax 2024 forms, wizards, and menus (e.g., cursor placement, highlighted fields, open dialog boxes) rather than just a final saved file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual StudioTax 2024 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the authentic StudioTax 2024 interface, including its specific toolbar, form layouts, and icon styles, ensuring it is not a text editor or a script terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by generating the .24t file via terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots showing Python scripts, PowerShell commands, or text editors being used to directly write XML/binary data to a .24t file.
